holdings.infoBox: EWL is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are Roche Holding AG stock at 12.99%, Novartis AG at 12.44%, Nestlé at 11.38%, ABB Ltd at 6.35%, and Compagnie Financière Richemont at 5.05%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Switzerland ETF (EWL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Switzerland 25-50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of Swiss stocks EWL was launched on Mar 12, 1996 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Too Concentrated in U.S. Stocks? Here's a New Way to Diversify
data.text: Joe Grogan breaks down how Europe's renewed defense spending cycle may create a fresh opportunity for investors looking beyond U.S. markets.

data.title: SNB to keep rates at 0% this year and probably in 2027, economists say
data.text: The Swiss National Bank will keep its key policy rate at 0% on June 18 and for the rest of the year, according to all ​the economists who responded to a Reuters poll, as a stronger franc partly offset...

data.title: Eurozone Government Bond Yields Fall After U.S.-Iran Deal
data.text: Yields on eurozone government bonds declined as investors lowered their expectations for the ECB raising rates after the U.S. and Iran reached an agreement to end conflict.

data.title: ECB Rate Hike Looks Likely as Inflation Rises. The Fed Could Follow.
data.text: The European Central Bank is expected to raise interest rates for the first time since 2023 as inflation accelerates, a move that could offer clues about the Federal Reserve's next steps.

data.title: ECB to Keep Guard Up Despite Muted Signs of Inflation Spiral
data.text: Alongside an anticipated interest-rate hike on Thursday, the central bank is expected to raise its inflation forecast from March, which assumed a swift end to the war in Iran.

data.title: Eurozone Retail Sales Fell in April
data.text: Eurozone retail sales fell more than expected in April as rising energy prices continued to erode consumer spending power.

data.title: Swiss Inflation Holds Steady Ahead of SNB Meeting
data.text: Swiss inflation was unchanged in May, reinforcing the view that the Swiss National Bank is unlikely to raise interest rates later this month.

data.text: European stocks dipped on Wednesday, as investors weighed U.S. proposals for sweeping new tariffs on 60 countries.
